name: Sollers Public Joint Stock Company
summary: Sollers Public Joint Stock Company, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells vehicles in Russia. It offers SUVs and LCVs; and automotive components, assembly kits, and engines. The company markets and sells its products under the UAZ, ZMZ, Ford Sollers, and Mazda Sollers brands. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Moscow, Russia. Sollers Public Joint Stock Company is a subsidiary of ERFIX LLC.
